paper_title: LaMDA: Language Models for Dialog Applications

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a **2B-parameter** dialog-focused Transformer decoder model scaled up from prior work, emphasizing next-token prediction on a massive 1.56T-word corpus combining public dialog and web text.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Public dialog data and web documents (1.56T words)
raw_extraction.application: Dialog applications, including chat, education, and content recommendations; role-specific tasks like teaching and information provision.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models for high-quality, safe, and factually-grounded dialog applications while addressing limitations of pure scaling on safety and factual grounding.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Sample-and-rank strategy for decoding + fine-tuning on annotated dialog data for SSI, safety, and groundedness
raw_extraction.extension: Role-specific preconditioning for domain grounding (e.g., single-greeting message for Mount Everest role)
raw_extraction.paper_title: LaMDA: Language Models for Dialog Applications

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces an **8B-parameter** variant of LaMDA, demonstrating the impact of model scaling on dialog quality, safety, and groundedness while retaining the same architecture and training paradigm as the 2B model.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Public dialog data and web documents (1.56T words)
raw_extraction.application: Dialog applications, including chat, education, and content recommendations; role-specific tasks like teaching and information provision.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models for high-quality, safe, and factually-grounded dialog applications while addressing limitations of pure scaling on safety and factual grounding.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Sample-and-rank strategy for decoding + fine-tuning on annotated dialog data for SSI, safety, and groundedness
raw_extraction.extension: Role-specific preconditioning for domain grounding (e.g., multi-turn role alignment for music recommendation agent)
raw_extraction.paper_title: LaMDA: Language Models for Dialog Applications

raw_extraction.innovation: **137B-parameter** largest LaMDA variant, showcasing the limits and opportunities of extreme scaling for dialog applications, alongside techniques to mitigate diminishing returns on safety and factual grounding through fine-tuning and external tool integration.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Public dialog data and web documents (1.56T words)
raw_extraction.application: Dialog applications, including chat, education, and content recommendations; role-specific tasks like teaching and information provision.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models for high-quality, safe, and factually-grounded dialog applications while addressing limitations of pure scaling on safety and factual grounding.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Sample-and-rank strategy for decoding + fine-tuning on annotated dialog data for SSI, safety, and groundedness
raw_extraction.extension: Uses **relative positional embeddings** (inherited from T5) and **gated-GELU activation** (from Raffel et al.) to support long-range dependencies in dialog contexts.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LaMDA: Language Models for Dialog Applications

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a unified model framework combining generative and discriminative fine-tuning for dialogue applications, integrating safety filtering, quality ranking, and external knowledge retrieval via a toolset (TS) for grounded responses.
raw_extraction.application: Dialogue systems, conversational AI, chat interfaces, information-seeking interactions, and safety-critical applications requiring grounded responses
raw_extraction.research_problem: Building conversational AI systems capable of generating safe, sensible, specific, interesting, and factually grounded responses in dialogue applications
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning for quality (sensibility, specificity, interestingness) and safety; generative fine-tuning for dialogue response generation; multi-task fine-tuning for groundedness via external tool integration
raw_extraction.extension: Multi-task fine-tuning integrates discriminative evaluation (safety, SSI) directly into generative response selection, enabling real-time filtering and ranking of candidate responses.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LaMDA: Language Models for Dialog Applications

raw_extraction.innovation: LaMDA introduces **participatory fine-tuning**—integrating human feedback and community input into training—to address safety, groundedness, and role consistency in open-ended dialog systems. It combines **large-scale pre-training with retrieval-augmented generation** to improve factual accuracy.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale internal text corpora (not explicitly named)
raw_extraction.application: Dialog applications, conversational AI, customer support, educational tutoring, and interactive storytelling with safety and groundedness guarantees.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, safe, and grounded open-ended dialog systems capable of maintaining role consistency and reducing harmful outputs while improving factual alignment with real-world knowledge.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning with crowd-annotated data for safety, groundedness, and helpfulness
raw_extraction.extension: **Retrieval-augmented generation** enables fact-checking against external sources during response generation, mitigating hallucinations.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LaMDA: Language Models for Dialog Applications

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced specialized dialogue-focused fine-tuning techniques, including safety fine-tuning and groundedness fine-tuning, to improve alignment with human values and factual accuracy in conversational settings.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale conversational datasets (internal Google datasets including user-generated dialogs)
raw_extraction.parameters: null (parameter count not explicitly stated in abstract or main text)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational AI, chat applications, dialogue systems, ethical AI alignment, safety-critical applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Creating advanced language models optimized specifically for natural, safe, and factually grounded conversational interactions
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Dialog-specific fine-tuning (including safety fine-tuning and groundedness fine-tuning)
raw_extraction.extension: Safety fine-tuning framework with crowdworker annotations for unsafe utterances (harmful content, bias, misinformation) and groundedness fine-tuning using structured evaluation criteria for factual correctness and contextual relevance.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LaMDA: Language Models for Dialog Applications
